General.Name: Jingrui Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Jingrui Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in development, investment, and management of real estate properties in the People's Republic of China. The company operates in three segments: Property Development Platform, Capital Platform, and All Other Platforms. It also invests in and rents office buildings and apartments. In addition, the company provides management and security services to residential and commercial properties; and engages in property design and decoration platform, investment platform, and other miscellaneous businesses. Further, it is involved in the provision of urban infrastructure development and building decoration engineering services; and hardware and building materials business. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.
General.Address: Building B, BenQ Business Plaza, Shanghai, China
